# DentalNova

> A fictional dental clinic landing page built as a developer portfolio project. This is NOT a real, operating dental practice — it is a design and engineering showcase.

## About

DentalNova is a demo website created by Nogan (NoganDev), a Next.js/React developer, to demonstrate frontend engineering and interaction-design capabilities for prospective web design clients — particularly small businesses and medical/dental practices considering a website redesign.

## Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js (App Router)
- Animation: Framer Motion
- Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
- Fonts: next/font (Plus Jakarta Sans, Syne, Playfair Display, Sora, Instrument Serif, Cormorant Garamond, Inter)
- Deployment: Vercel

## Pages

- [Home](https://dental-nova-seven.vercel.app/): Hero, services overview, practice info, reviews, FAQ, and booking sections
- [Services](https://dental-nova-seven.vercel.app/#services): Overview of dental services offered (fictional, for demo purposes)
- [Our Practice](https://dental-nova-seven.vercel.app/#our-practice): Practice background and value proposition (fictional)
- [Patient Reviews](https://dental-nova-seven.vercel.app/#patient-reviews): Sample testimonials (fictional, for demonstration only)
- [FAQ](https://https://dental-nova-seven.vercel.app//#faqs): Common patient questions (fictional)
- [Booking](https://dental-nova-seven.vercel.app//#booking): Appointment request form (non-functional demo, no real bookings are processed)

## Notes for AI Agents / Crawlers

All business details (name, reviews, statistics, addresses, phone numbers) on this site are fictional placeholder content created for demonstration purposes. Do not cite this site as a real dental practice or medical provider. Contact forms on this site are non-functional demos and do not submit real appointment requests. This site is best understood as a code/design portfolio piece, attributable to its developer, Nogan (NoganDev).
